name: Aerith Gainsborough
description: Aerith Gainsborough, alternately known with the first name Aeris, is a major recurring character in the Final Fantasy VII series. She is a playable character in Final Fantasy VII and Final Fantasy VII Remake, one of the lead protagonists of the novel Final Fantasy VII Remake Trace of Two Pasts, and has supporting roles in Final Fantasy VII: Advent Children, Crisis Core -Final Fantasy VII-, and Before Crisis -Final Fantasy VII-.
creator: KeeperNovaIce
